"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\polynomial_gui.dir/objects.a
C:\w64devkit\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\polynomial_gui.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\polynomial_gui.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\w64devkit\bin\c++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\polynomial_gui.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o polynomial_gui.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libpolynomial_gui.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\polynomial_gui.dir\linkLibs.rsp
